certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact analysis process defined
Insufficient transparency and explainability mechanisms for delivery date calculations
Missing continual improvement and performance monitoring framework beyond escalation triggers
Limited documentation of AI system objectives, scope, and accountability structures
recommendations: Implement formal AI risk management and impact assessment aligned with ISO 42001 Clause 6
Add decision logging and explainability features for resource allocation outputs
Establish metrics and audit trails for ongoing AI performance and compliance monitoring
Define roles, responsibilities, and human oversight integration within the AI management system

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI risk assessment or impact analysis process defined
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
